dog.name: Attack Dog
dog.description:
Anti-infantry unit.
Can detect cloaked units and spies.
  Strong vs Infantry
  Weak vs Vehicles, Aircraft

e1.name: G.I.
e1.description: General-purpose infantry.\n  Strong vs Infantry\n  Weak vs Vehicles, Aircraft

snipe.name: Sniper
snipe.description: Special anti-infantry unit.\n  Strong vs Infantry\n  Weak vs Vehicles, Aircraft

spy.name: spy
spy.description:
Infiltrates enemy structures for intel or
sabotage. Exact effect depends on the
building infiltrated.
  Unarmed
Special Ability: Disguises

ghost.name: Navy SEAL
ghost.description:
Elite commando infantry, armed with
a sub machine gun and C4.
  Strong vs Infantry, Buildings
  Weak vs Vehicles, Aircraft
Special Ability: Destroy Building with C4

ccomand.name: Chrono Commando
ccomand.description:
Elite commando infantry, armed with
a sub machine gun and C4.
  Strong vs Infantry, Buildings
  Weak vs Vehicles, Aircraft
Special Ability: Destroy Building with C4

ptroop.name: Psi Commando
ptroop.description:
Psychic infantry. Can mind control enemy units.
  Strong vs Infantry, Vehicles, Buildings
  Weak vs Dogs, Terror Drones, Aircraft
Special Ability: Destroy Building with C4

tany.name: Tanya
tany.description:
Elite commando infantry, armed with 
dual pistols and C4.
  Strong vs Infantry, Buildings
  Weak vs Vehicles, Aircraft
Special Ability: Destroy Building with C4

Maximum 1 can be trained.

cleg.name: Chrono Legionnaire
cleg.description: High-tech soldier.\n Strong vs Infantry, Vehicles\n Weak vs Aircraft

lcrf.name: Amphibious Transport
lcrf.description: General-purpose naval transport.\nCan carry infantry and vehicles.\n  Unarmed

dest.name: Destroyer
dest.description:
Allied Main Battle Ship armed with cannons and
 an Osprey helicopter.
Can detect submarines and sea animals.
  Strong vs Naval units
  Weak vs Ground units, Aircraft

aegis.name: Aegis Cruiser
aegis.description: Anti-Air naval unit.\n  Strong vs Aircraft\n  Grounds units, Ships

dlph.name: Dolphin
dlph.description: Trained dolphin\narmed with sonic beams.\n  Strong vs Ships

carrier.name: Aircraft Carrier
carrier.description: Aircraft carrier ship.\n  Strong vs Tanks, Structures\n  Weak vs Infantry

cmin.name: Chrono Miner
cmin.description: Gathers Ore.\n  Unarmed\nSpecial ability: Can teleport to own refineries

mtnk.name: Grizzly Battle Tank
mtnk.description: Allied Main Battle Tank.\n  Strong vs Vehicles, Ships\n  Weak vs Infantry, Aircraft

tnkd.name: Tank Destroyer
tnkd.description: Special anti-armor unit.\n  Strong vs Vehicles, Ships\n  Weak vs Infantry, Aircraft

fv.name: Infantry Fighting Vehicle
fv.description:
Multi-Purpose Vehicle.
Without passenger:
  Strong vs Infantry, Aircraft
  Weak vs Vehicles, Ships
Special Ability: Armament depends on passenger.

sref.name: Prism Tank
sref.description: Fires deadly beams of light.\n  Strong vs Infantry, Vehicles\n  Weak vs Aircraft

mgtk.name: Mirage Tank
mgtk.description: As tree disguised tank.\n  Strong vs Infantry, Vehicles\n  Weak vs Aircraft

e2.name: Conscript
e2.description: Cheap rifle infantry.\n  Strong vs Infantry\n  Weak vs Vehicles, Aircraft

flakt.name: Flak Trooper
flakt.description: Anti-Air/Anti-Infantry unit.\n  Strong vs Aircraft, Infantry\n  Weak vs Vehicles

shk.name: Tesla Trooper
shk.description:
Special armored unit using electricity.
  Strong vs Infantry, Light armor
  Weak vs Tanks, Aircraft
Special ability: Charge tesla coils

terror.name: Terrorist
terror.description:
Carries C4 charges taped to his body and kamikazes enemies
blowing them up quickly and efficiently.
  Strong vs Ground units
  Weak vs Aircraft

deso.name: Desolator
deso.description:
Carries a radiation-emitting weapon.
Can deploy for area-of-effect damage.
  Strong vs Infantry, Light armor
  Weak vs Tanks, Aircraft

ivan.name: Crazy Ivan
ivan.description: Specialist for explosives. Can plant a Bomb on anything, even Cows.

civan.name: Chrono Ivan
civan.description: Specialist for explosives. Can plant a Bomb on anything, even Cows. Can teleport on anywhere on the map.

yuri.name: Yuri
yuri.description:
Psychic infantry. Can mind control enemy units.
Can be deployed to unleash a powerful psychic wave.
  Strong vs Infantry, Vehicles
  Weak vs Terror Drones, Aircraft, Buildings

yuripr.name: Yuri Prime
yuripr.description:
Psychic infantry. Can mind control enemy units from a great range.
Can be deployed to unleash a powerful psychic wave.
  Strong vs Infantry, Vehicles
  Weak vs Terror Drones, Aircraft, Buildings

Maximum 1 can be trained.

sapc.name: Amphibious Transport
sapc.description: General-purpose naval transport.\nCan carry infantry and vehicles.\n  Unarmed

sub.name: Typhoon Attack Sub
sub.description:
Submerged anti-ship unit armed with
torpedoes.
Can detect other submarines and Giant Squids.
  Strong vs Ships
  Weak vs Ground units, Aircraft
Special Ability: Submerge

hyd.name: Sea Scorpion
hyd.description: Anti-Air/Anti-Infantry naval unit.\n  Strong vs Aircraft, Infantry\n  Weak vs Vehicles, Naval Units

sqd.name: Giant Squid
sqd.description: Ocean creature\npunches enemies in close combat.\n  Strong vs Ships

harv.name: War Miner
harv.description: Gathers Ore.\n  Strong vs Infantry\n  Weak vs Vehicles, Aircraft

dron.name: Terror Drone
dron.description: \n  Strong vs Infantry, Vehicles\n  Weak vs Aircraft

htk.name: Flak Track
htk.description: Infantry Transport and Anti-Air/Anti-Infantry vehicle.\n  Strong vs Aircraft, Infantry\n  Weak vs Vehicles

htnk.name: Rhino Heavy Tank
htnk.description: Soviet Main Battle Tank.\n  Strong vs Vehicles\n  Weak vs Infantry, Aircraft

apoc.name: Apocalypse Tank
apoc.description:
Soviet Advanced Battle Tank with Double Barrel
and Anti-Aircraft Missile Launcher.
  Strong vs Vehicles, Aircraft
  Weak vs Infantry

ttnk.name: Tesla Tank
ttnk.description: Russian special tank armed with dual small Tesla Coils.\n  Strong vs Vehicles, Infantry\n  Weak vs Aircraft

dtruck.name: Demolition Truck
dtruck.description: Demolition Truck, actively armed with nuclear explosives.
